text_block_list.text:
One evening, as we're walking through the
shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Huh, I wonder what all the fuss is about over
there.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ooh, so they're holding a raffle. Looks fun!

The coupon they're offering as a grand prize is for
a well-known hot spring that's notoriously hard to
book dates for.

It would be great if I could win it and gift it to Fuji
Kiseki since she's been working so hard...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Do you want to give it a try? I actually have a
raffle ticket with me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Since we're here and everything, go ahead and
give it a shot!

I almost take it, but I feel bad since she got the
raffle ticket from her own purchases. I push it
back to her.
choice_data_list: I think you should do it instead.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hmm, you sure? I don't mind either way, but...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why don't we do it together? We can
combine our luck. What do you say?

At her suggestion, we grasp the tumbler's lever
together and give it a good spin!

A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: W-we got the grand prize?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it! I didn't expect to actually win
the grand prize.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Our combined luck must be really good. Hehe.

I really want Fuji Kiseki to use the coupon on
herself, so I hold it out to her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You want me to have it? Are you positive?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking that you could use it to go on
vacation and recharge.
choice_data_list: Use it to take a good friend with you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Right. Okay. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Well... Would you like to go with me, then?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You told me to go with a good friend, right? You
fit that category perfectly, so let's go together!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I mean, only if you want to. I don't want to force
you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Good! Then it's settled.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That said, we're both so busy right now. Let's
make plans for this once things have settled
down, okay?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll put together the best itinerary for you, so look
forward to it! ♪

So that's how I end up making a promise with Fuji
Kiseki to go on vacation together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Wow, first prize! We did pretty great.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This hamburger steak sure is big, though... Want
to split it with me?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
We can enjoy it while watching a nice DVD
together. It'll be fun, I promise.

That night, Fuji Kiseki and I make a wonderful
dinner out of the deluxe carrot hamburger steak.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The cool thing about this play is how lighthearted
the lines are despite being a subliminal
commentary on the societal problems of its time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There are a lot of interpretations on the meaning
of the protagonist's ribbon colors, and...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry! Listen to me blabbing on. The show's
about to start.

That night, I catch a rare glimpse of a previously
unknown side to Fuji Kiseki as she stares
captivated by what's on the screen.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Second prize, huh? Not bad!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But... I don't know if we can finish all these. It
might be tough with just the two of us.
choice_data_list:
Why don't we share them with your dorm
residents?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That's a good idea. We have nothing but big
eaters in Ritto, so I'm sure they'll love this.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I know! I should cook all these up before serving
them to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Really? Thank you! I'd appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What should we make, then? Stew? Steak? Oh,
cake might be good.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Cooking together is pretty fun.

With our combined efforts, we prepare a lovely
carrot feast.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What a shame! But there's no need to be
disappointed just yet.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to cast some magic on this carrot and
give you a good show. Can you wait in your office
for about an hour, please?
I do as she asks and wait for her in my office.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for being so patient. All my magic
preparations are complete.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahem! Now, behold!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Here comes the carrot transformation of the
century! In three, two, one!

Fuji Kiseki conjures up a fluffy plate of carrot
omelet rice from thin air!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Did you like that? Eat up while it's still
warm.

The carrot omelet rice she made is so delicious I
can almost believe it really was conjured by
magic.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Too bad... I guess we weren't so lucky today.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What a shame. I really wanted to see your face
light up in joy...
We're both deflated by the result.
